LINE_PRCDR_MDFR_CD_2

LINE_PRCDR_MDFR_CD_4 

LABEL: Line Procedure Code Modifier Code (1–4) 

DESCRIPTION: These are fields to capture a modifier code associated with the LINE_PRCDR_CD field on the OT claim 
line. The first modifier is reported in LINE_PRCDR_MDFR_CD_1. If more than one modifier is reported, 
the additional codes are in
